name: penut-operator
description: Local AI browser operator for approved Penut tasks.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/preload.cjs && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check src/agent/ai/openai-client.js && node --check src/agent/ai/action-planner.js && node --check src/agent/browser-actions.js && node --check src/agent/cli.js && node --check src/agent/runtime.js && node --check src/browser/chrome-controller.js && node --check src/storage/task-store.js && node --check src/storage/settings-store.js
